file_analyses.file_purpose: Page object for the Cancellation Banner component that appears when a subscription is scheduled for cancellation. Contains locators for the cancellation banner UI elements including the timeline link, keep subscription button, and subscription resume modal elements. Used to interact with the banner that allows users to view cancellation timeline or resume their subscription.

classes.class_purpose: Page object representing the cancellation banner component that displays when a user has scheduled their subscription for cancellation. Provides locators for all interactive elements within the cancellation banner including the see cancellation timeline link, keep subscription button, and the subscription resume confirmation modal with its resume and back buttons. Also includes locator for the subscription resumed success banner that appears after resuming.

locators.ui_element_description: Link or button that opens the cancellation timeline modal showing the steps and dates of the cancellation process
Button within the cancellation banner that allows the user to keep their subscription and cancel the scheduled cancellation
The main cancellation banner container element that displays when a subscription is scheduled for cancellation
Resume button in the subscription resume confirmation modal that confirms the user wants to resume their subscription
Back button in the subscription resume confirmation modal that closes the modal without resuming the subscription
Success banner that appears after the user has successfully resumed their subscription

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Playwright Page instance representing the browser page

functions.what_it_does: Initializes the CancellationBannerPage by calling the parent BasePageObject constructor with super().__init__(page) to set up the page instance. Then defines all cancellation banner UI element locators as attributes on the self.elements object. Creates locators for see_cancellation_timeline link using data-testid selector, keep_subscription_button using a composite selector targeting a button within the cancellation banner, cancellation_banner container, resume_button and back_button for the subscription resume modal, and resume_banner for the success message. All locators are stored as string selectors on the elements object for later use by test methods.

file_analyses.analysis_notes: This is a simple page object focused on the cancellation banner component. It follows the BasePageObject pattern where locators are stored as string attributes on self.elements rather than as Playwright locator objects. The actual locator objects would be created when needed using self.page.locator(self.elements.locator_name). This page object has no action methods defined - it only provides locator definitions. Test scripts would need to access the locators and perform actions directly. The locators cover the main cancellation banner interactions: viewing the timeline, keeping the subscription, and the resume confirmation flow.

file_analyses.file_purpose: Comprehensive page object for the subscription cancellation flow pages. Contains extensive locator definitions for all elements across multiple cancellation-related screens including printer information display, cancellation summary, cancellation feedback survey, retention offers (change plan, pause plan, transfer subscription), plan change modal with all plan options, paper cancellation elements, and cancellation timeline components. Provides a helper method to dynamically select plan buttons based on page count.

classes.class_purpose: Comprehensive page object representing all screens and components in the subscription cancellation flow. Encapsulates locators for printer information display, cancellation summary card with animation, confirm cancellation and keep enrollment buttons, cancellation retention section with alternative options (change plan, pause plan, transfer subscription, contact support, pay-as-you-print), change plan modal with all available plan buttons (10, 25, 50, 100, 300, 500, 700, 1500 pages), cancellation feedback survey with multiple radio button options for cancellation reasons, paper subscription cancellation elements, and various modal and navigation elements. Provides a utility method to dynamically retrieve plan buttons based on page count.

locators.ui_element_description: Printer image displayed in the cancellation page showing the printer model that is enrolled in the subscription
Printer name text element displaying the model name of the enrolled printer
Printer serial number text element displaying the serial number of the enrolled printer
Animation container element in the cancellation summary card that displays visual feedback during cancellation
Subscription information section in the cancellation summary showing current plan details
Primary button to confirm and proceed with subscription cancellation
Button to keep the subscription active and cancel the cancellation process

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Playwright Page instance representing the browser page

functions.what_it_does: Initializes the CancellationPage by calling the parent BasePageObject constructor with super().__init__(page). Then defines an extensive collection of 82 locators covering all elements across the entire cancellation flow. Locators are organized into logical groups: printer information elements (printer_img, printer_info_name, printer_info_serial), cancellation summary elements (cancellation_summary_image, subscribed_info, confirm_cancellation_button, keep_enrollment_button), retention section elements (change_plan_link, pause_plan_link, transfer_subscription_link, contact_hp_support_link), change plan modal elements with all plan buttons from 10 to 1500 pages, cancellation feedback survey elements with multiple radio button options for different cancellation reasons, paper subscription specific elements, timeline elements, and various modal and navigation elements. All locators are stored as string selectors on the self.elements object.

parameters.name: plan_pages
parameters.description: The number of pages for the plan button to retrieve (e.g., '10', '25', '50', '100', '300', '500', '700', '1500')

functions.what_it_does: Dynamically retrieves a Playwright locator object for a specific plan button based on the provided plan_pages parameter. Constructs the attribute name by formatting plan_attr as f'plan_{plan_pages}_button' (e.g., 'plan_50_button' for plan_pages='50'). Uses hasattr() to check if the self.elements object has an attribute with that name. If the attribute exists, retrieves the selector string using getattr(self.elements, plan_attr), creates a Playwright locator using self.page.locator(selector), and returns the locator object. If the attribute does not exist, raises a ValueError with a descriptive message indicating that the plan button for the specified page count was not found. This method provides a flexible way to select plan buttons without hardcoding each plan option in test code.

file_analyses.analysis_notes: This is an extremely comprehensive page object with 82 locators covering the entire cancellation flow. It demonstrates good organization by grouping related locators with comments. The get_plan_button() utility method is a smart design pattern that allows dynamic selection of plan buttons without needing separate methods for each plan. The page object uses the BasePageObject pattern where locators are stored as string selectors on self.elements. The locators use a mix of strategies including data-testid (most common and most reliable), XPath for text-based selection, and CSS class selectors. Many locators have multiple selector options separated by commas to handle different UI variations. This page object would be used across many test scenarios related to subscription cancellation, plan changes, and retention flows.

key_reusable_methods: CancellationPage.get_plan_button — Dynamically retrieves plan button locator by page count
CancellationTimelinePage.timeline_stepper_header — Gets specific timeline stepper header by index
CancellationTimelinePage.cancellation_step — Gets specific cancellation step with validation and waits
ChangePlanCancellationPage.select_ink_plan — Dynamically selects ink plan by page count
ChangePlanCancellationPage.back_button_choose_plan — Gets back button with text filtering
ConfirmationPage.select_ink_plan — Dynamically selects ink-only plan by page count
ConfirmationPage.select_paper_plan — Dynamically selects ink and paper plan by page count
key_reusable_locators: CancellationPage.keep_enrollment_button — Button to keep subscription active
CancellationPage.change_plan_link — Link to open change plan modal
CancellationPage.plan_10_button through plan_1500_button — All plan selection buttons
ChangePlanCancellationPage.next_bc_radio — Next billing cycle radio button
ConfirmationPage.first_name through country — All shipping form fields
ConfirmationPage.card_number, exp_month, exp_year, cvv_input — Credit card form fields
